title: Digital Circus Plushies
description:
Pomni and Jax plushies from Digital Circus added into Minecraft
using Custom Model Data. Doesn't Replace Anything!
body:
----------------------------------------------------------------

This resource pack through the use of Custom model data.
adds Pomni and Jax Plushies into the game. 

**It does not replace any blocks/items**

It uses carved pumpkins as the base so that you can also wear them on your
head if you so choose to.

----------------------------------------------------------------

![Pomni plush sitting on a table next to a bed in minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b5301a1c821d606e32880e6b46aaf8c4086cf1c.png)
![Jax plush sitting on a table next to a bed in minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e7225dc0191d99c5dabc1fc60e964124f467de0.png)

----------------------------------------------------------------
**Use These commands to give yourself the plushies in game**

(1.15-1.20.4)

/give @s minecraft:carved_pumpkin{CustomModelData:5001}

(1.20.5-1.20.6)

/give @s minecraft:carved_pumpkin[minecraft:custom_model_data=5001]

----------------------------------------------------------------

Those commands will give you the Pomni plush. replace "5001" with "5002" in the commands to get the Jax Plush.
Check out the "READ ME" text file that comes in the resource pack for some more info/help.
it has these commands and some other stuff.

I might add the Cain plush in the future, i'm unsure yet. currently adding Cain is not a priority for me since I want to work on some other things.

----------------------------------------------------------------


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

There is a "secret"/extra model included with this pack, and it will always be included with most of my custom model resource packs. (it shouldn't be too hard to find with some messing around with the numbers)

</details>
